title: DTE Energy schedules full year 2021 earnings release, conference call
text: DETROIT, Jan. 27, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) will announce its full year 2021 earnings before the market opens Thursday, Feb. 10, 2022.

title: DTE Energy invests $2.2 billion with Michigan businesses in 2021
text: DETROIT, Jan. 26, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- DTE Energy (NYSE: DTE) today announced it invested $2.2 billion with Michigan businesses in 2021, creating and sustaining more than 10,000 jobs across the state.

title: Hollingsworth expands on sustainability initiatives by enrolling Metro Detroit locations in DTE Energy's MIGreenPower program
text: 100% of the electricity use at three Hollingsworth locations will be attributed to renewable energy 100% of the electricity use at three Hollingsworth locations will be attributed to renewable energy

title: Loyola High School of Detroit becomes the first high school to enroll in DTE Energy's MIGreenPower program
text: Program enrollment attributes a portion of the school's electricity use to renewable energy Program enrollment attributes a portion of the school's electricity use to renewable energy

title: DTE Energy proposes investment to improve reliability, modernize grid for the future and continue clean energy journey
text: •Commits investments to update energy grid and electric generation system for 21st century demands •Launches 10-month review process with Michigan Public Service Commission and other stakeholders for first rate increase in two-and-a-half years•Proposed investment could translate up to $10 increase/month on average residential customer bill •Commits investments to update energy grid and electric generation system for 21st century demands •Launches 10-month review process with Michigan Public Service Commission and other stakeholders for first rate increase in two-and-a-half years•Proposed investment could translate up to $10 increase/month on average residential customer bill

title: DTE Energy's (DTE) MIGreenPower Adds New Customer in Detroit
text: Being part of DTE Energy's (DTE) MIGreenPower, the Detroit-Windsor Tunnel aims at attributing 10% of its electricity use to renewable energy.

title: DTE Energy helps vulnerable customers, as frigid weather sets in, with $5 million donation to Michigan outreach agencies
text: United Way of Southeastern Michigan, the Salvation Army, True North and The Heat and Warmth Fund to receive customer assistance funds United Way of Southeastern Michigan, the Salvation Army, True North and The Heat and Warmth Fund to receive customer assistance funds

title: Detroit-Windsor Tunnel reduces carbon footprint through enrollment in DTE Energy's MIGreenPower program
text: The Detroit-Windsor Tunnel will be attributing 10% of its electricity use to renewable energy with a goal of achieving 100% by 2030 The Detroit-Windsor Tunnel will be attributing 10% of its electricity use to renewable energy with a goal of achieving 100% by 2030
